passage_title: Why being bored is stimulating - and useful, too

sentences.sentence: We all know how it feels - it's impossible to keep your mind on anything, time stretches out, and all the things you could do seem equally unlikely to make you feel better.
sentences.translation: 我们都知道那种感觉——你不可能把注意力集中在任何事情上，时间被拉长，而你能做的所有事情似乎都同样不太可能让你好受些。

structure.text: We all know how it feels
it's impossible to keep your mind on anything
all the things you could do seem equally unlikely to make you feel better

difficult_points: 破折号后的三个并列分句具体解释 how it feels，即无聊时的体验。
all the things you could do 中省略关系词的从句 you could do 修饰 things。
seem equally unlikely to make you feel better 表示各种可做之事都同样不像会改善感受。

sentences.sentence: But defining boredom so that it can be studied in the lab has proved difficult.
sentences.translation: 但是，要给无聊下定义，以便在实验室中研究它，已经被证明很困难。

structure.text: defining boredom so that it can be studied in the lab
so that it can be studied in the lab

difficult_points: defining boredom 是动名词短语作主语，表示“定义无聊”这一行为。
so that 引导目的状语从句，说明定义无聊是为了进行实验室研究。
has proved difficult 使用现在完成时，强调到目前为止这件事一直很难。

sentences.sentence: For a start, it can include a lot of other mental states, such as frustration, apathy, depression and indifference.
sentences.translation: 首先，它可能包含许多其他心理状态，比如沮丧、冷漠、抑郁和漠不关心。

structure.text: can include a lot of other mental states
such as frustration, apathy, depression and indifference

difficult_points: For a start 表示列举原因的第一点，用来解释为什么定义无聊困难。
it 指代前一句的 boredom。
such as 后列举的心理状态说明无聊与其他情绪边界不清。

sentences.sentence: There isn't even agreement over whether boredom is always a low-energy, flat kind of emotion or whether feeling agitated and restless counts as boredom, too.
sentences.translation: 人们甚至还没有达成一致：无聊是否总是一种低能量、平淡的情绪，或者感到焦躁不安是否也算作无聊。

structure.text: over whether boredom is always a low-energy, flat kind of emotion or whether feeling agitated and restless counts as boredom, too
whether boredom is always a low-energy, flat kind of emotion
whether feeling agitated and restless counts as boredom, too

difficult_points: There isn't even agreement 是存在句，表示连基本共识都没有。
两个 whether 从句并列，构成争议的两个方面。
feeling agitated and restless 是动名词短语，在第二个 whether 从句中作主语。
counts as boredom 表示“算作无聊”，强调分类问题。

sentences.sentence: In his book, Boredom: A Lively History, Peter Toohey at the University of Calgary, Canada, compares it to disgust - an emotion that motivates us to stay away from certain situations.
sentences.translation: 在他的《无聊：一段生动的历史》一书中，加拿大卡尔加里大学的 Peter Toohey 将无聊与厌恶相比较；厌恶是一种促使我们远离某些情境的情绪。

structure.text: In his book, Boredom: A Lively History
Peter Toohey at the University of Calgary, Canada
an emotion that motivates us to stay away from certain situations
that motivates us to stay away from certain situations

difficult_points: Boredom: A Lively History 是插入的书名，说明观点来源。
it 指代 boredom，compare it to disgust 表示把无聊与厌恶作类比。
破折号后的 an emotion 是 disgust 的同位语，解释厌恶这种情绪的功能。
that motivates us ... 修饰 an emotion，说明厌恶会驱动人避开某些情境。

sentences.sentence: 'If disgust protects humans from infection, boredom may protect them from "infectious" social situations,' he suggests.
sentences.translation: 他提出：“如果厌恶保护人类免受感染，那么无聊或许能保护他们免受‘有感染性’的社交情境影响。”

structure.text: If disgust protects humans from infection
boredom may protect them from "infectious" social situations

difficult_points: If 从句建立类比条件：厌恶保护人免受感染。
them 指代 humans，说明无聊可能同样起保护作用。
"infectious" 加引号表示比喻，并非真正医学意义上的感染。

sentences.sentence: By asking people about their experiences of boredom, Thomas Goetz and his team at the University of Konstanz in Germany have recently identified five distinct types: indifferent, calibrating, searching, reactant and apathetic.
sentences.translation: 通过询问人们的无聊体验，德国康斯坦茨大学的 Thomas Goetz 及其团队最近识别出了五种不同类型：无差别型、校准型、搜寻型、反抗型和冷漠型。

structure.text: By asking people about their experiences of boredom
Thomas Goetz and his team at the University of Konstanz in Germany
have recently identified five distinct types
indifferent, calibrating, searching, reactant and apathetic

difficult_points: By asking ... 表示研究方法，即通过询问体验来分类无聊。
have recently identified 使用现在完成时，强调最近研究得到的结果。
冒号后的五个形容词是 five distinct types 的具体列举。

sentences.sentence: These can be plotted on two axes - one running left to right, which measures low to high arousal, and the other from top to bottom, which measures how positive or negative the feeling is.
sentences.translation: 这些类型可以绘制在两条轴上——一条从左到右，衡量从低到高的唤醒程度；另一条从上到下，衡量这种感觉有多积极或消极。

structure.text: These can be plotted on two axes
which measures low to high arousal
the other from top to bottom
which measures how positive or negative the feeling is

difficult_points: These 指前一句的五种无聊类型。
can be plotted 是被动语态，表示这些类型可被放到坐标轴上表示。
破折号后用 one 和 the other 分别解释两条轴。
两个 which 从句分别说明每条轴测量什么。

sentences.sentence: Intriguingly, Goetz has found that while people experience all kinds of boredom, they tend to specialise in one.
sentences.translation: 有趣的是，Goetz 发现，虽然人们会体验各种无聊，但他们往往会专门倾向于其中一种。

structure.text: that while people experience all kinds of boredom, they tend to specialise in one
while people experience all kinds of boredom
they tend to specialise in one

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 Goetz 的发现内容。
while 引导让步状语从句，表示尽管人们会经历各种无聊。
one 指代前文的 one kind/type of boredom。
tend to 表示倾向，不是绝对规律。

sentences.sentence: Of the five types, the most damaging is 'reactant' boredom with its explosive combination of high arousal and negative emotion.
sentences.translation: 在这五种类型中，危害最大的是“反抗型”无聊，它结合了高唤醒和负面情绪，具有爆发性。

structure.text: with its explosive combination of high arousal and negative emotion

difficult_points: Of the five types 限定比较范围，表示在五类无聊之中。
the most damaging 是最高级，说明危害最大的一类。
with its explosive combination ... 补充说明 reactant boredom 危害大的原因。
high arousal and negative emotion 是 combination 的两个组成部分。

sentences.sentence: The most useful is what Goetz calls 'indifferent' boredom: someone isn't engaged in anything satisfying but still feels relaxed and calm.
sentences.translation: 最有用的是 Goetz 所说的“无差别型”无聊：某人没有投入任何令人满意的事情，但仍然感到放松和平静。

structure.text: someone isn't engaged in anything satisfying but still feels relaxed and calm

difficult_points: what Goetz calls ... 是名词性从句，作 is 的表语。
冒号后解释 indifferent boredom 的具体状态。
isn't engaged in anything satisfying 与 still feels relaxed and calm 形成转折。
still 强调虽然没有投入满意的事情，却仍保持放松。

sentences.sentence: However, it remains to be seen whether there are any character traits that predict the kind of boredom each of us might be prone to.
sentences.translation: 然而，是否存在某些性格特征能够预测我们每个人可能容易陷入哪种无聊，还有待观察。

structure.text: whether there are any character traits that predict the kind of boredom each of us might be prone to
that predict the kind of boredom each of us might be prone to
each of us might be prone to

difficult_points: it remains to be seen 是固定表达，表示某事尚不确定。
whether 引导真正的待观察内容。
that predict ... 修饰 character traits，说明性格特征可能具有预测作用。
each of us might be prone to 是省略关系词的从句，修饰 the kind of boredom。

sentences.sentence: Psychologist Sandi Mann at the University of Central Lancashire, UK, goes further.
sentences.translation: 英国中央兰开夏大学的心理学家 Sandi Mann 走得更远。

structure.text: Psychologist Sandi Mann at the University of Central Lancashire, UK

difficult_points: Psychologist Sandi Mann 是主语核心，后面的机构信息补充其身份。
goes further 表示她的观点比前文研究者更进一步，而不是实际走路。
此句承上启下，引出 Mann 对无聊积极作用的看法。

sentences.sentence: 'All emotions are there for a reason, including boredom,' she says.
sentences.translation: 她说：“所有情绪的存在都有原因，包括无聊。”

structure.text: All emotions are there for a reason

difficult_points: are there for a reason 表示某物存在有其作用或原因。
including boredom 是补充成分，把无聊纳入 all emotions。
she says 是引语后的报道分句，主语 she 指 Sandi Mann。

sentences.sentence: Mann has found that being bored makes us more creative.
sentences.translation: Mann 发现，感到无聊会让我们更有创造力。

structure.text: that being bored makes us more creative

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 Mann 的研究发现。
being bored 是动名词短语，在从句中作主语。
make + 宾语 + 形容词补足语结构中，us 是宾语，more creative 是补足语。

sentences.sentence: 'We're all afraid of being bored but in actual fact it can lead to all kinds of amazing things,' she says.
sentences.translation: 她说：“我们都害怕无聊，但事实上它可能带来各种令人惊奇的事情。”

structure.text: We're all afraid of being bored
but in actual fact it can lead to all kinds of amazing things

difficult_points: but 连接转折，前半句是人们害怕无聊，后半句强调无聊可能有积极结果。
it 指代 being bored 或 boredom。
can lead to 表示可能带来某种结果，不是已经必然发生。

sentences.sentence: In experiments published last year, Mann found that people who had been made to feel bored by copying numbers out of the phone book for 15 minutes came up with more creative ideas about how to use a polystyrene cup than a control group.
sentences.translation: 在去年发表的实验中，Mann 发现，那些通过从电话簿中抄写数字 15 分钟而被弄得感到无聊的人，比对照组想出了更多关于如何使用聚苯乙烯杯的创意想法。

structure.text: that people who had been made to feel bored by copying numbers out of the phone book for 15 minutes came up with more creative ideas about how to use a polystyrene cup than a control group
who had been made to feel bored by copying numbers out of the phone book for 15 minutes
came up with more creative ideas about how to use a polystyrene cup than a control group

difficult_points: published last year 是过去分词短语，修饰 experiments。
who had been made to feel bored 修饰 people，使用过去完成时被动语态说明实验处理。
by copying numbers ... 表示让人感到无聊的方式。
more creative ideas ... than a control group 是比较结构，说明实验组创造力更高。

sentences.sentence: Mann concluded that a passive, boring activity is best for creativity because it allows the mind to wander.
sentences.translation: Mann 得出结论：被动、无聊的活动最有利于创造力，因为它能让思绪游走。

structure.text: that a passive, boring activity is best for creativity because it allows the mind to wander
a passive, boring activity is best for creativity
because it allows the mind to wander

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明 Mann 的结论内容。
passive 和 boring 并列修饰 activity。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释这种活动有利于创造力的原因。
it 指代 a passive, boring activity。

sentences.sentence: In fact, she goes so far as to suggest that we should seek out more boredom in our lives.
sentences.translation: 事实上，她甚至进一步建议，我们应该在生活中主动寻找更多无聊。

structure.text: she goes so far as to suggest
that we should seek out more boredom in our lives

difficult_points: goes so far as to suggest 表示观点推进到较大胆的程度。
that 引导 suggest 的宾语从句，说明她建议的内容。
seek out 表示主动寻找，而不是被动经历。

sentences.sentence: Psychologist John Eastwood at York University in Toronto, Canada, isn't convinced.
sentences.translation: 加拿大多伦多约克大学的心理学家 John Eastwood 并不信服。

structure.text: Psychologist John Eastwood at York University in Toronto, Canada

difficult_points: 主语包含人物身份和任职机构，核心是 Psychologist John Eastwood。
isn't convinced 表示不接受前文观点，引出不同立场。
此句在段落中起转折作用，从 Mann 的积极看法转向 Eastwood 的质疑。

sentences.sentence: 'If you are in a state of mind-wandering you are not bored,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“如果你处于走神状态，你就不是无聊。”

structure.text: If you are in a state of mind-wandering

difficult_points: If 从句提出条件，说明 Eastwood 对 mind-wandering 与 boredom 的区分。
in a state of 表示处于某种状态。
not bored 是否定判断，直接反驳前文把思绪游走与无聊联系起来的观点。

sentences.sentence: 'In my view, by definition boredom is an undesirable state.'
sentences.translation: “在我看来，按定义来说，无聊是一种令人不快的状态。”
difficult_points: In my view 表明这是 Eastwood 的个人观点。
by definition 强调他从概念定义层面判断无聊。
undesirable state 表示不受欢迎、不想处于的状态。

sentences.sentence: That doesn't necessarily mean that it isn't adaptive, he adds.
sentences.translation: 他补充说，那并不一定意味着它没有适应性。
difficult_points: That 指前一句“无聊是不想要的状态”这一判断。
doesn't necessarily mean 表示“不一定意味着”，避免绝对化。
it 指 boredom，adaptive 表示在进化或功能上可能有适应价值。

sentences.sentence: 'Pain is adaptive - if we didn't have physical pain, bad things would happen to us.
sentences.translation: “疼痛是有适应性的——如果我们没有身体疼痛，坏事就会发生在我们身上。

structure.text: if we didn't have physical pain
bad things would happen to us

difficult_points: Pain is adaptive 用疼痛作类比，说明不愉快的状态也可能有功能。
if we didn't have physical pain 使用虚拟条件，假设没有身体疼痛。
would happen 表示假设条件下可能发生的后果。

sentences.sentence: Does that mean that we should actively cause pain?
sentences.translation: 这是否意味着我们应该主动造成疼痛呢？

structure.text: that we should actively cause pain

difficult_points: Does that mean 是一般疑问结构，用反问推进论证。
that 指前一句“疼痛有适应性”这一观点。
actively cause pain 表示主动制造痛苦，Eastwood 用它说明有适应性并不等于应该追求。

sentences.sentence: No.
sentences.translation: 不是。
difficult_points: No. 是对前一句反问的简短回答。
此处省略了完整句式，大意是“这并不意味着我们应该主动造成疼痛”。

sentences.sentence: But even if boredom has evolved to help us survive, it can still be toxic if allowed to fester.'
sentences.translation: 但即使无聊已经进化为帮助我们生存，如果任其恶化，它仍然可能有害。”

structure.text: But even if boredom has evolved to help us survive

difficult_points: even if 引导让步状语从句，承认无聊可能有生存功能。
it 指 boredom，still be toxic 表示即使有功能也可能有害。
if allowed to fester 是省略结构，相当于 if it is allowed to fester。

sentences.sentence: For Eastwood, the central feature of boredom is a failure to put our 'attention system' into gear.
sentences.translation: 在 Eastwood 看来，无聊的核心特征是未能让我们的“注意系统”运转起来。

structure.text: is a failure to put our 'attention system' into gear
to put our 'attention system' into gear

difficult_points: For Eastwood 表示从 Eastwood 的观点来看。
a failure to do 表示未能做某事，是无聊的核心特征。
put ... into gear 是比喻表达，表示让注意系统开始有效运转。
'attention system' 加引号，表示作者借用或强调这一概念。

sentences.sentence: This causes an inability to focus on anything, which makes time seem to go painfully slowly.
sentences.translation: 这导致人无法专注于任何事情，从而让时间似乎过得痛苦而缓慢。

structure.text: causes an inability to focus on anything
which makes time seem to go painfully slowly
makes time seem to go painfully slowly

difficult_points: This 指前一句未能启动注意系统这件事。
an inability to focus on anything 表示无法把注意力集中在任何事上。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，概括前面结果并说明进一步后果。
make + 宾语 + 动词原形结构中，time 是宾语，seem 是宾补。

sentences.sentence: What's more, your efforts to improve the situation can end up making you feel worse.
sentences.translation: 更重要的是，你为改善局面所做的努力最终可能会让你感觉更糟。

structure.text: your efforts to improve the situation
can end up making you feel worse

difficult_points: What's more 用来添加更进一步、通常更重要的信息。
to improve the situation 修饰 efforts，说明努力的目的。
end up doing 表示最终结果往往出人意料。
making you feel worse 是动名词短语作 end up 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: 'People try to connect with the world and if they are not successful there's that frustration and irritability,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“人们试图与世界建立联系；如果他们没有成功，就会产生那种挫败和烦躁。”

structure.text: People try to connect with the world
and if they are not successful there's that frustration and irritability

difficult_points: try to connect with the world 表示主动寻求与外界建立联系。
and 后面包含 if 条件从句，说明失败时产生的情绪。
there's that frustration and irritability 是存在句，that 带有“那种熟悉的”语气。
he says 是引语后的报道分句。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps most worryingly, says Eastwood, repeatedly failing to engage attention can lead to a state where we don't know what to do any more, and no longer care.
sentences.translation: Eastwood 说，也许最令人担忧的是，反复无法调动注意力可能会导致一种状态：我们不知道该再做什么，也不再在意。

structure.text: where we don't know what to do any more, and no longer care

difficult_points: Perhaps most worryingly 是句子副词，评价后面情况最令人担忧。
repeatedly failing to engage attention 是动名词短语作主语。
where 引导定语从句修饰 a state，说明这种状态的内容。
don't know what to do any more 和 no longer care 是并列结果。

sentences.sentence: Eastwood's team is now trying to explore why the attention system fails.
sentences.translation: Eastwood 的团队现在正试图探索注意系统为什么会失灵。
difficult_points: is now trying 使用现在进行时，表示研究正在进行。
why the attention system fails 是名词性从句，作 explore 的宾语。
the attention system 回指上一段提到的注意系统。

sentences.sentence: It's early days but they think that at least some of it comes down to personality.
sentences.translation: 现在还为时尚早，但他们认为，至少其中一部分归结于人格因素。

structure.text: that at least some of it comes down to personality

difficult_points: It's early days 是习语，表示研究还处在早期阶段。
but 连接转折，尽管早期，他们已有初步判断。
it 指 the attention system fails 这一问题或其原因。
comes down to personality 表示最终可归因于人格。

sentences.sentence: Boredom proneness has been linked with a variety of traits.
sentences.translation: 容易无聊的倾向已经被发现与多种特质有关。

structure.text: has been linked with a variety of traits

difficult_points: Boredom proneness 指一个人容易感到无聊的倾向。
has been linked with 是现在完成时被动语态，表示研究中已经发现相关联。
a variety of traits 表示不止一种人格或心理特质。

sentences.sentence: People who are motivated by pleasure seem to suffer particularly badly.
sentences.translation: 受快乐驱动的人似乎尤其容易深受其害。

structure.text: People who are motivated by pleasure

difficult_points: who are motivated by pleasure 修饰 People，说明特定人群。
are motivated by 是被动结构，表示行为动机来源于快乐。
seem to 表示研究观察到的倾向，而不是绝对结论。
particularly badly 强调受影响程度很重。

sentences.sentence: Other personality traits, such as curiosity, are associated with a high boredom threshold.
sentences.translation: 其他人格特质，比如好奇心，则与较高的无聊阈值相关。

structure.text: are associated with a high boredom threshold

difficult_points: such as curiosity 插入举例，说明其他人格特质中的一种。
are associated with 表示相关，不等于直接因果。
a high boredom threshold 指更不容易感到无聊的阈值较高。

sentences.sentence: More evidence that boredom has detrimental effects comes from studies of people who are more or less prone to boredom.
sentences.translation: 更多关于无聊具有有害影响的证据，来自对不同程度容易无聊的人群的研究。

structure.text: More evidence that boredom has detrimental effects
who are more or less prone to boredom

difficult_points: that boredom has detrimental effects 是同位语从句，解释 evidence 的内容。
comes from studies 表示证据来源于研究。
who are more or less prone to boredom 修饰 people，说明研究对象。
more or less 表示程度不同，不是“大约”的意思。

sentences.sentence: It seems those who bore easily face poorer prospects in education, their career and even life in general.
sentences.translation: 那些容易感到无聊的人在教育、职业甚至整体生活方面似乎面临更差的前景。

structure.text: those who bore easily face poorer prospects in education, their career and even life in general

difficult_points: It seems 后省略 that，引出似乎成立的结论。
those who bore easily 指容易感到无聊的人。
face poorer prospects 表示面临更差的发展前景。
in education, their career and even life in general 是并列范围，说明影响广泛。

sentences.sentence: But of course, boredom itself cannot kill - it's the things we do to deal with it that may put us in danger.
sentences.translation: 但当然，无聊本身不会杀人——可能使我们陷入危险的是我们为了应对无聊而做的那些事。

structure.text: it's the things we do to deal with it that may put us in danger
we do to deal with it
that may put us in danger

difficult_points: boredom itself 强调无聊本身并非直接致命。
破折号后是强调句，强调真正危险的是 the things we do。
we do to deal with it 修饰 things，说明这些行为是为了处理无聊。
it 指 boredom，that may put us in danger 修饰 things。

sentences.sentence: What can we do to alleviate it before it comes to that?
sentences.translation: 在事情发展到那种地步之前，我们能做些什么来缓解它呢？
difficult_points: What can we do 是特殊疑问句，用来引出解决办法。
to alleviate it 表示目的，it 指无聊或其负面影响。
before it comes to that 指在发展到危险结果之前。

sentences.sentence: Goetz's group has one suggestion.
sentences.translation: Goetz 的团队有一个建议。
difficult_points: Goetz's group 指前文研究无聊类型的团队。
one suggestion 表示接下来只介绍一个具体建议。
此句承接前一句问题，引出如何缓解无聊的回答。

sentences.sentence: Working with teenagers, they found that those who 'approach' a boring situation - in other words, see that it's boring and get stuck in anyway - report less boredom than those who try to avoid it by using snacks, TV or social media for distraction.
sentences.translation: 在与青少年合作研究时，他们发现，那些“接近”无聊情境的人——换句话说，看到它很无聊却仍然投入进去的人——报告的无聊感少于那些试图通过零食、电视或社交媒体来分散注意力、逃避无聊的人。

structure.text: that those who 'approach' a boring situation - in other words, see that it's boring and get stuck in anyway - report less boredom than those who try to avoid it by using snacks, TV or social media for distraction
in other words, see that it's boring and get stuck in anyway
who try to avoid it by using snacks, TV or social media for distraction

difficult_points: Working with teenagers 是现在分词短语，说明研究对象或情境。
that 引导 found 的宾语从句，其中主干是 those ... report less boredom than those ...。
破折号中的 in other words ... 解释 'approach' a boring situation 的含义。
by using snacks, TV or social media for distraction 表示逃避无聊的方式。

sentences.sentence: Psychologist Francoise Wemelsfelder speculates that our over-connected lifestyles might even be a new source of boredom.
sentences.translation: 心理学家 Francoise Wemelsfelder 推测，我们过度连接的生活方式甚至可能成为无聊的新来源。

structure.text: that our over-connected lifestyles might even be a new source of boredom
might even be a new source of boredom

difficult_points: speculates 表示推测，说明这是一种观点而非确定事实。
that 引导宾语从句，说明推测内容。
over-connected lifestyles 指现代人过度联网、过度连接的生活方式。
might even be 表示可能性，并带有“甚至”的强调。

sentences.sentence: 'In modern human society there is a lot of overstimulation but still a lot of problems finding meaning,' she says.
sentences.translation: 她说：“在现代人类社会中，有大量过度刺激，但仍然有许多寻找意义的问题。”

structure.text: there is a lot of overstimulation
but still a lot of problems finding meaning

difficult_points: there is 是存在句，说明现代社会中存在过度刺激。
but still 引出对比：刺激很多，但寻找意义的问题仍然很多。
finding meaning 是现在分词短语，修饰 problems，表示与寻找意义有关的问题。
she says 是引语后的报道分句，she 指 Wemelsfelder。

sentences.sentence: So instead of seeking yet more mental stimulation, perhaps we should leave our phones alone, and use boredom to motivate us to engage with the world in a more meaningful way.
sentences.translation: 所以，也许我们不应追求更多精神刺激，而应该放下手机，并利用无聊来促使自己以更有意义的方式与世界互动。

structure.text: So instead of seeking yet more mental stimulation
perhaps we should leave our phones alone
and use boredom to motivate us to engage with the world in a more meaningful way
to motivate us to engage with the world in a more meaningful way
to engage with the world in a more meaningful way

difficult_points: So 表示结论，承接前面过度刺激与意义缺失的问题。
instead of seeking ... 表示替代关系：不要继续寻找更多刺激。
leave our phones alone 是口语化表达，意为暂时不碰手机。
use boredom to motivate us ... 表示把无聊作为推动我们更有意义地接触世界的动力。

expressions.meaning_zh: 不碰手机；把手机放一边
